creator: erdelyi4@googlemail.com
text:
Once I remove the "compat" word from the lines "group, passwd" in the nsswitch.conf of the jail the jail won't start up.
I use the ezjail framework to manage the jails.
I run a samba 4 AD DC in the jail.
The keyword "compat" I need to remove as winbind in the samba4 package doesn't seem to work once "compat" is included in one of the lines "group, passwd".
